note: File Browser is a configuration layer: it ships a ready-made Entity Browser for files (Masonry grid + DropzoneJS upload) built on entity_browser + entity_embed + dropzonejs, with no settings form of its own. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source/config to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On Drupal 11 I want a Media-library-style file picker: a grid of existing images to select plus drag-and-drop upload. What does the File Browser module give me out of the box, and what is it built on?
evals.expected_output: A ready-made Entity Browser (browse_files) with a Masonry thumbnail grid of files to select and a DropzoneJS upload tab, built on entity_browser + entity_embed + dropzonejs. No custom settings form of its own.

evals.prompt: How do I make an Article's image field use File Browser instead of the plain upload widget on a Drupal site?
evals.expected_output: On the bundle's Manage form display, set the File/Image field's widget to Entity Browser (or File Browser), then in the widget settings select the 'Browser for files' (browse_files) entity browser.

evals.prompt: What is the machine name of the pre-built Entity Browser that File Browser installs, and is there a modal variant?
evals.expected_output: browse_files (iframe display, auto_open true) is the main one; browse_files_modal is the modal variant.

evals.prompt: Which module powers the upload tab inside File Browser, and where do uploaded files go by default?
evals.expected_output: The DropzoneJS Entity Browser widget powers the 'Upload files' tab; the default upload location is public://.

evals.prompt: The File Browser grid of thumbnails is a masonry layout. Which JavaScript libraries render it, and how are they installed?
evals.expected_output: The Masonry and imagesLoaded (plus Backbone/Underscore) JS libraries render the grid; install them into /libraries via the bundled composer.libraries.json (Wikimedia composer-merge-plugin) or manually.

evals.prompt: What are the main contrib module dependencies I must have enabled for File Browser to work on Drupal 11?
evals.expected_output: entity_browser, entity_embed, and dropzonejs (with dropzonejs_eb_widget); embed is required transitively via entity_embed. Plus core field, file, image, views.

evals.prompt: I want to change which files show in the File Browser grid and how they are sorted. Which shipped config do I edit?
evals.expected_output: Edit the shipped View views.view.file_entity_browser (the browser's 'Files listing' view widget) to change the files shown, filters, sort, and pager.

evals.prompt: How can File Browser be used to embed a chosen image into CKEditor rich text?
evals.expected_output: It ships an Entity Embed button (embed.button.file_browser) for embedding files/images in rich text, and an image_embed block plugin.
